title: One Block Horror
description: Start on a single block and progress by unlocking resources, dimensions, and challenges… now with added HORROR mods that introduce creepy creatures.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a5db036cb50b42a3954a6943833cc8682b2380c.png)

This One Block modpack takes you from a single starting block to full exploration of new dimensions, staged progression, automation, bosses, and evolving challenges just like the normal version. However, this edition now includes horror mods that add terrifying creatures, eerie sounds, unexpected threats, and a much darker atmosphere.

Each One Block phase becomes more unpredictable, combining the classic progression with frightening encounters that will test your focus and survival skills. Perfect for players who want the traditional One Block experience with a more intense, horror-themed twist.
